title: Junior Business Development Manager at Mahagun Group

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at Mahagun Group
jsonLd.description:
Mahagun Group has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Coimbatore office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Mahagun Group:
Mahagun Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Mahagun Group!
